hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.html|*.js|*.css|*.json) cd /Users/wysiecki/projects/wysiecki/homepage && npx prettier --write "$f" ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
